title: Piquant Smoky Slovakian Vegetable Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew featuring a blend of vegetables and spices, cooked to perfection in a claypot. This dish is vegetarian-friendly and showcases the rich flavors of Slovakian cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large claypot, heat a couple of tablespoons of oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they are translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes, smoked paprika, and all-purpose seasoning, and stir to combine.
Pour in the vegetable broth and canned diced tomatoes, and bring the mixture to a boil.
Cover the claypot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 45 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender and the stew has thickened slightly.
Remove the claypot from the oven and stir in the chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
